full_text:
Zheng Du 鄭度
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zheng Du (鄭度)was born in Guanghuan. Advised Liu Zhang to adopt a scorched earth policy and was then sacked. Zheng Du was affiliated with Liu Zhang.
